title: Announcements
description: Important updates and announcements from the Ideabrowser team.
headings: Lock in Launch Pricing Before October 24th

sections.heading: Lock in Launch Pricing Before October 24th
sections.text: Launch pricing ends October 24th. Lock in lifetime pricing before prices increase to $499/year (Starter) and $1,499/year (Pro).

text:
Oct 8, 2025
Pricing
Lock in Launch Pricing Before October 24th

Launch pricing ends October 24th. Lock in lifetime pricing before prices increase to $499/year (Starter) and $1,499/year (Pro).
html:
Oct 8, 2025Pricing

Lock in Launch Pricing Before October 24th

Launch pricing ends October 24th. Lock in lifetime pricing before prices increase to $499/year (Starter) and $1,499/year (Pro).
